message:
fix(daemon): make DaemonLock.Close() thread-safe with sync.Once (bd-19)

DaemonLock.Close() read and wrote l.file without synchronization. If
called concurrently (signal handler + deferred cleanup), it could
double-close the fd, and a reused fd number could cause an unrelated
fd to be closed. Wrap the close logic in sync.Once so only the first
call performs the close.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
